chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.D-179 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025 Mr. Ashfaq Hussain Abro, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh. -.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Sarfraz Ali M. Abbasi, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.1 to 4, taken on record. Learned Addl. A. G and learned counsel for the respondents No.1 to 4 jointly urge that the prayer made by the petitioner i.e. awarding son quota, has become null and void through judgment passed by the learned apex Court, therefore, they seek disposal of the petition. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner still insists by contending that the petitioner has got vested right for appointment of his son under the “son quota’. Learned Addl. A. G is of the opinion that once policy/claim has been declared by the apex forum as null and void, it cannot be acceded to/entertained. Accordingly and in view of above this petition merits no consideration, which is hereby dismissed with no order as to costs. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
